name: Suncorp Group Limited
analysis: SUN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 14% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$18.6200, stop A$16.9092, target A$23.7524 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
